configuration.title: Simple Launcher
command.menu.title: Command Menu
command.import-commands.title: Import Commands from supported config files like package.json and Cargo.toml
command.config-panel.title: Open Config Panel
configuration.monitor-interval.descripti: Memory monitor polling interval in seconds.
configuration.custom-commands.displayNam: The display name shown in the UI. If omitted, the command itself is used.
configuration.custom-commands.monitorTar: The process name or regex pattern string to monitor. If omitted, monitoring is disabled.
configuration.custom-commands.cwd.descri: The working directory used when executing the command.
configuration.current-command.descriptio: The last command selected to be shown in the status bar. Set to null to hide it.
configuration.current-command.displayNam: The display name shown in the status bar. If omitted, the command itself is used.
configuration.current-command.monitorTar: The process name or regex pattern string to monitor. If omitted, monitoring is disabled.
configuration.current-command.cwd.descri: The working directory used when executing the command.
